# Delaware Weather Network

A comprehensive weather information portal focused on the state of Delaware, offering real-time weather data including watches and warnings, location-based forecasts, interactive radar, UV index readings, tide times, and sunrise/sunset schedules. The site is designed to be a go-to resource for Delaware residents and visitors seeking accurate and up-to-date local weather intelligence.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Track Delaware&#39;s Skies with Live Local Weather Radar — Delaware Weather Network

URL: https://example.com
Description: Your ultimate Delaware weather hub: scan live local weather radar near me, track storms in real time, and get instant watches and warnings. Stay ahead of every front!

# Delaware Weather network...accurate and reliable weather forecasting


### Real-time watches and warnings, location-based forecasts, interactive radar, UV index readings, tide times, and sunrise/sunset schedules — built for Delaware residents and visitors.

Coastal Conditions

## Statewide Weather Intelligence


Delaware Weather Network delivers trusted, real-time local conditions and expert forecasts. From coastal tide charts to inland radar, every tool is built for the First State.












### Watches & Warnings


Stay ahead of severe weather with instant alerts for tornado, thunderstorm, and flood watches across all Delaware counties.











### Forecasts by Location


Pinpoint hourly and 10-day outlooks for Wilmington, Dover, Rehoboth Beach, and every Delaware community.











### Local Weather Radar


Track live precipitation with high-resolution local weather radar looping across the Delmarva Peninsula.











### UV Index Readings


Monitor daily ultraviolet exposure levels for safe beach days along the Delaware coast and inland regions.











### Tide Schedules


Plan coastal activities with accurate high and low tide predictions for Lewes, Bethany Beach, and the Delaware Bay.











### Sunrise & Sunset


Track golden hour, dawn, and dusk times to plan your day around Delaware's natural light.

















## See Delaware Weather at a Glance


Our live local weather radar gives you a clear, real‑time view of storms, rain bands, and clear skies across the First State. Pan and zoom to check conditions in your exact neighborhood.


- ### Hyper‑Local Precision Street‑level radar data so you know exactly what's heading toward your door.

- ### Coastal Awareness Monitor Atlantic storm tracks and coastal flood zones before they reach the shore.

- ### Fast, Reliable Updates Radar imagery refreshes every few minutes so you're never caught off guard.












Wilmington
Dover
Newark
Rehoboth Beach
Lewes

From Wilmington to Rehoboth Beach, our real-time data and local weather radar insights help you make informed decisions every day. Explore the numbers that power Delaware's most trusted weather resource.

Pinpoint Your Day with Live Local Weather Radar Updates — Delaware Weather Network

# Statewide Forecasts & Active Conditions


Your authoritative portal for Delaware weather—organized by city, inland region, and coast. Stay ahead of changing conditions with location‑based forecasts, real‑time watches and warnings, and current snapshots from every corner of the First State.








### Regional Forecasts


Detailed outlooks for Wilmington, Dover, Georgetown, and coastal communities—updated hourly with temperature, wind, humidity, and precipitation trends.

View forecasts  →






### Watches & Warnings


Immediate visibility of all active NWS alerts across Delaware—severe thunderstorm, flood, winter, and coastal hazard advisories with clear county-level mapping.

View alerts  →






### Current Snapshots


Live readings from stations statewide: temperature, sky cover, wind speed, UV index, tide times, and sunrise/sunset schedules—all in one glance.

View conditions  →
















## Current Watches & Warnings


Stay informed with real-time hazard notifications across Delaware. Our network monitors the National Weather Service feed to deliver the latest coastal flood watches, severe thunderstorm warnings, and marine advisories directly to your screen. Understanding these alerts helps you make safe decisions whether you are inland, at the beach, or on the bay.


- Inland flood and severe storm tracking

- Beach rip current and coastal flood watches

- Delaware Bay and Inland Bays marine advisories









Coastal Flood Watch
Until 6:00 AM EDT


### Minor Tidal Flooding Possible Along Delaware Coast


High astronomical tides combined with onshore flow may produce minor inundation in low-lying areas near Rehoboth Beach, Lewes, and Bethany Beach. Monitor the latest local weather radar for precipitation bands that could exacerbate flooding during the next high tide cycle.

Affected: Sussex County coastal zones





Severe Thunderstorm Warning
Until 9:15 PM EDT


### Damaging Winds & Frequent Lightning Expected


A line of strong thunderstorms is tracking eastward across Kent and New Castle Counties. Radar indicates wind gusts up to 60 mph and dangerous cloud-to-ground lightning. Seek shelter indoors and stay away from windows. This warning updates continuously via our live weather radar feed.

Affected: Dover, Wilmington, Middletown





Small Craft Advisory
Until 4:00 AM EDT


### Hazardous Seas on Delaware Bay Waters


Sustained northeast winds of 15 to 25 knots with gusts to 30 knots are creating rough chop and waves of 3 to 5 feet on Delaware Bay. Inexperienced mariners, especially those operating smaller vessels, should avoid navigating these conditions. Check the marine forecast before departure.

Affected: Delaware Bay, Inland Bays













## Forecasts by Location


Detailed outlooks for key communities across the First State. Updated hourly using our live local weather radar network.


North

Central

Inland South

Coast







### Wilmington


Partly cloudy skies with a chance of scattered afternoon showers. Breezy conditions developing by evening.


H: 68°
L: 52°


NW 12 mph
40% Precip.






### Newark


Mostly sunny early, then increasing clouds. Mild temperatures with light variable winds.


H: 70°
L: 54°


SW 8 mph
20% Precip.






### Dover


Sunny intervals with high thin cirrus. Warmer inland temperatures and light coastal breeze.


H: 72°
L: 56°


S 10 mph
15% Precip.






### Middletown


Pleasant conditions with a mix of sun and clouds. Comfortable humidity levels throughout the day.


H: 71°
L: 53°


W 9 mph
25% Precip.






### Rehoboth Beach


Onshore flow bringing cooler marine air. Patchy morning fog clearing to partly sunny skies.


H: 66°
L: 58°


E 14 mph
35% Precip.






### Lewes


Breezy with increasing high clouds. Sunset brings a slight chance of isolated coastal drizzle.


H: 65°
L: 57°


NE 15 mph
45% Precip.















## Delaware Live Radar View


Track storm cells, precipitation bands, and coastal weather systems moving across the First State in real time. Our local weather radar gives you the visual intelligence to plan ahead, whether you're watching a squall line approach Rehoboth Beach or monitoring snow showers building over northern New Castle County.

















### Storm Motion & Tracking


See precisely where cells are heading and how fast they're moving. Our live weather radar overlays directional vectors so you can anticipate arrival times for rain, hail, or tornadic signatures before they reach your location.








### Coastal Influence Zones


The Atlantic and Delaware Bay shape our weather dramatically. Radar clearly reveals sea-breeze fronts, coastal flood potential, and marine-layer precipitation that inland local weather radar near me stations often miss.








### Rapid Update Cadence


Our radar composite refreshes every 3–5 minutes, giving you the latest local weather radar live sweep. That speed is critical when a watch becomes a warning and every minute counts for making safety decisions.
















## Turn Forecasts Into Daily Decisions


Delaware's coastal weather changes fast — from sudden summer thunderstorms to winter nor'easters. Our planning tools help residents, visitors, and business owners stay ahead of the conditions. Whether you're scheduling a school run, managing an outdoor worksite, or planning a weekend at Rehoboth Beach, real-time local weather radar and location-based alerts give you the confidence to make smarter choices every day.

Get Your Forecast











### School Run & Commute


Check live weather radar before you head out. Our hour-by-hour precipitation forecast helps you dodge the rain during morning drop-off and evening pickup across New Castle County.









### Outdoor Workdays


Lightning alerts and UV index readings keep your crew safe. Use our severe weather warnings to plan around afternoon storms, especially during Delaware's peak summer thunderstorm season.









### Weekend Beach Trips


Before you head to the Delaware beaches, check tide times and sunrise schedules. Our coastal marine forecast helps you pick the perfect window for swimming, surfing, or a sunset walk along the shore.

Description: Master Delaware&#39;s coast with tide times, UV index, and sunrise schedules backed by local weather radar near me. Your beach day starts with perfect timing. Explore coastal data!

# Coastal Timing & Daylight Awareness


### Plan your Delaware beach day with real-time UV index readings, accurate tide windows, and sunrise-sunset schedules for every bay and shoreline.










UV Index






Tides






Daylight














## UV Index Guidance


Plan your outdoor time wisely with our real-time UV index readings for Delaware beaches and beyond. Understanding the ultraviolet radiation level helps you take the right precautions, whether you're heading to Rehoboth Beach, Cape Henlopen, or your own backyard.






0-2

### Low


Minimal risk. Safe to be outside unprotected for extended periods. Ideal for beach walks and casual gardening.



3-5

### Moderate


Take care during midday hours. Wear sunscreen and sunglasses. Seek shade during peak sun intensity.



6-7

### High


Protection essential. Reduce time in the sun between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m. Use SPF 30+ and protective clothing.



8-11+

### Very High to Extreme


Unprotected skin can burn in minutes. Avoid being outside during midday. Seek shade and use SPF 50+.










### Midday Awareness


UV rays are strongest between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m. Even on cloudy days, up to 80% of UV radiation can reach your skin. When planning outdoor activities along Delaware's coast, check the UV index alongside our live local weather radar for the most complete picture before heading out.


















## Delaware Tide Times


Understanding the rhythm of Delaware's coastal tides is essential for planning a successful day on the water. Whether you're heading out for a fishing charter, launching a boat, enjoying a beach day, or managing waterfront operations, our detailed tide windows help you make informed decisions. We track high and low tide predictions for the state's most popular coastal points so you can coordinate your activities with the natural ebb and flow of the Atlantic and Delaware Bay.


Tide predictions are based on astronomical data and local observational models. Always check for updated local weather radar live feeds before heading out, as storm surges and wind patterns can significantly alter expected water levels. For those searching for a local weather radar near me, our interactive tools provide real-time context alongside these tide schedules.




Bay Conditions & Shoreline Planning: Delaware Bay points often experience wind-driven tide shifts. Always monitor local marine forecasts and use our local weather radar to track approaching systems before navigating shallow inlets.

## Delaware Sunrise & Sunset Times


Plan your day with precision. Whether you're heading to the beach, navigating the bay, or scheduling outdoor work, accurate daylight timing is essential for travel, recreation, and business across the First State.











### Sunrise


6:32 AM


First light breaks over the Atlantic, painting the Delaware coast in soft gold.









### Sunset


7:48 PM


Evening glow fades behind the Chesapeake, closing the day with vibrant coastal hues.









### Total Daylight


13h 16m


Ample daylight hours perfect for exploring Delaware's parks, beaches, and historic districts.











### County-by-County Timing Notes



Northern Delaware
Sunrise 6:35 AM · Sunset 7:44 PM


Central Delaware
Sunrise 6:33 AM · Sunset 7:47 PM


Coastal Delaware
Sunrise 6:31 AM · Sunset 7:49 PM



Times vary slightly by longitude. Coastal areas see the earliest sunrise and latest sunset, while northern inland towns shift by a few minutes. Check your local radar for precise timing.














## Plan Around Delaware's Coast & Daylight


Quick-reference checklists for every way you enjoy the water and sun.










### Beach Day Prep


- Check UV index & tide times

- Monitor live local weather radar

- Pack sun protection & hydration

- Review rip current advisories










### Marina & Boating Prep


- Confirm wind speed & gusts

- Verify tide times & water levels

- Check marine warnings & alerts

- File a float plan with a contact










### Outdoor Schedule Prep


- Review sunrise & sunset times

- Scan hourly precipitation chances

- Note temperature highs & lows

- Have an indoor backup plan ready








Questions about your local forecast or interested in a partnership?


Contact Our Team

# Weather questions & local outreach




We welcome general inquiries, partnership proposals, and community weather interest from across the First State. Whether you're tracking a storm, planning an event, or representing a local organization, the Delaware Weather Network team is here to help you stay informed and prepared.









### Public Questions


Residents and visitors can reach out with weather-related questions, report local conditions, or request clarification on watches and warnings.







### Business Coordination


Local businesses and event organizers can coordinate with us for tailored forecast support, site-specific alerts, and partnership opportunities.







### Media & Community


Media outlets, schools, and community groups can request data, schedule interviews, or collaborate on weather education initiatives.




















## Send Us a Message


Reach our team for inquiries about Delaware weather data, custom forecast requests, or partnership opportunities.




Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy




Send Message









### What to Expect


We focus exclusively on Delaware weather intelligence. Whether you need clarification on a local radar reading, want to report a weather observation, or are interested in our data services, our team is here to help.





### Typical Response Time


We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. During active severe weather events affecting Delaware, response times may be slightly extended as our team prioritizes live updates and public safety alerts.





### Common Topics


- Local weather radar interpretation

- Custom forecast requests

- Partnership & advertising

- General feedback & suggestions









[business_phone]

















## Stay Connected, Stay Informed


Follow the Delaware Weather Network on social media for real-time updates, live local weather radar loops, and community-driven storm reports. Never miss a watch or warning again.









### Connect on Facebook


Join our growing community for daily forecasts, severe weather alerts, and live radar discussions. Share your local weather photos and reports with fellow Delawareans.









### Follow on X (Twitter)


Get instant notifications for watches, warnings, and breaking weather news. Our rapid-fire updates keep you ahead of the storm with the latest live weather radar near me.






Your voice matters — tag us in your weather photos and reports to be featured in our community spotlights.












## Stay Ahead of Delaware Weather


Count on the Delaware Weather Network for accurate, around-the-clock local conditions. Whether you're planning your day or tracking a storm, our radar, forecasts, and alerts keep you informed and prepared.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Forecasts & Conditions
- Coastal & Sun



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/10/2026



Delaware Weather Network ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Delaware Weather Network

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Forecasts & Conditions
- Coastal & Sun



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 10, 2026



Delaware Weather Network is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Delaware Weather Network

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Forecasts & Conditions
- Coastal & Sun



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 10, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Delaware Weather Network

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Weather & Meteorology provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Delaware Weather Network provides Weather & Meteorology through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Delaware Weather Network. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Delaware Weather Network

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
